theme_notes: Touchstones: Trump's Russia-Ukraine 3-day ceasefire and Russia's Victory Day parade (May 9), the US-Iran Strait of Hormuz oil tanker standoff, and the PSG vs Arsenal Champions League final in Budapest. Also riffing on the Devil Wears Prada sequel (Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway) and Spirit Airlines' collapse.
settled: Trump brokered peace between Russia and Ukraine. Your zero brokered itself. Similar energy.
Balanced like the Strait of Hormuz on a good day. Don't get comfortable.
The Devil Wears Prada sequel is out. Your debt has no sequel. Good.
youOwe: Less than Spirit Airlines charged for a carry-on. And Spirit is gone. Think about that.
A three-day ceasefire costs more to broker than this. Pay it.
This is Met Gala valet parking adjacent. Small money, big embarrassment.
Devil Wears Prada sequel ticket prices. Miranda wouldn't let this slide.
That's a tank of gas at post-Hormuz prices. Feels personal.
Russia's parade was downsized this year. So is your Venmo game.
Arsenal waited 20 years to reach a Champions League final. Your debt has comparable patience.
Half a barrel of Iranian crude at current prices. Somehow your partner's problem.
The Devil Wears Prada sequel catering budget. Per scene. Per day.
One thousand prisoners got swapped this week. You can't swap a receipt.
Iran threatened the Strait of Hormuz over less. Pay the tab.
PSG flies to Budapest in style. You're flying economy on this debt.
This is a ceasefire-negotiation-level problem now. Someone call Trump.
Your debt escalates like US-Iran relations. Fast, sideways, no clear exit.
Spirit Airlines went under for less mismanagement. Allegedly.
Russia downgraded the Victory Day parade. Your spending did the opposite.
Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz. Your Venmo is similarly inaccessible.
Kharg Island is more financially stable than this relationship right now.
theyOwe: A symbolic amount. Like Russia's downsized parade. Noted. Not impressed.
Less than a Spirit Airlines seat. That airline is gone. So is their urgency.
Ceasefire-tier money. Don't celebrate. It won't hold.
Two tickets to The Devil Wears Prada sequel. They remember the popcorn, not the tab.
A tank of gas at post-Hormuz crisis prices. Not symbolic. Just owed.
Putin's parade budget didn't stretch far. Neither does your partner's Venmo reach.
Arsenal's kit sponsor doesn't forgive this kind of debt. Neither should you.
Met Gala look, rented from a stranger. The cost evaporated. So did their memory.
Meryl Streep earns this per scene. Your partner somehow can't find it.
Trump negotiated a three-day truce in two calls. Can't negotiate your payment.
You could fund half a prisoner swap. Your partner couldn't fund dinner.
PSG's fuel bill to Budapest. And somehow you're covering it.
Your partner has Iran energy. Always threatening to pay. Never quite delivering.
Champions League prize money starts here. Your partner starts ignoring texts here.
Spirit Airlines had more financial integrity at its peak. That's the bar now.
The Russia-Ukraine ceasefire costs less to maintain. Your partner: more expensive.
At this level, Kharg Island is somehow involved. You can't prove it. You feel it.
Arsenal haven't won a Champions League. Your partner hasn't paid this. Suspicious pattern.
